title: Tour de France 2026 - seven favorites under pressure

news.title: Tour de France 2026 - Pogacar, Vingegaard, Seixas, Evenepoel and more: here are the seven big favorites for the yellow jersey

world.title: Tour de France 2026 - seven favorites under pressure

environment.compositionIntent: A shallow warm-earth Saccaro surround preserves active negative space and dark scraped anchors while leaving the accepted middleground pressure band and foreground mark field readable.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained because all accepted isolated previews are broad frontal fields and the brief asks for asymmetrical frontal pressure rather than portrait-specific reframing.

contrast.notes: Warm, matte illumination keeps the dirty ground open; a low off-white rim separates black contour strokes and pale slashes without adding a generic glow layer.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the accepted background shell and surrounding value field.
World palette and radius preserve pale active negative space, warm-earth planes, dark anchors, far color daubs, and scraped hatching without assigning it the main news-pressure band.

Kept at origin as the accepted background shell; tuned warm-earth environment, radius, fog, and grade to preserve pale active negative space, dark anchors, far accent daubs, and scraped hatching without making it the news-pressure band.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available concept-reference image directly; used it only for broad warm-earth palette, scraped density, accent colors, and block/slash mood.
Static check succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with validation.pass true.
Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview captured successfully with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a dominant full-surround Saccaro-derived warm-earth shell with pale active negative space, dark vertical anchors, black/white scraped hatching, pigment dust, and seven restrained ragged accent daubs for concentrated Tour favorites.

Render report confirms WebGPU backend readiness and WebGPU-safe evidence including MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, sky-background-field, color-field, procedural-marks, soft-particles, and utilities.createDirectionSpaceSkyboxShell.

compositionAdaptations: Held in the declared middleground ownership lane as the dominant seven-favorite pressure band.
Kept near center and scaled to preserve dark vertical anchors, yellow jersey cue, compressed radial markers, and black/white directional slashes.
Held in the declared middleground lane, near center and scaled as the primary seven-favorite pressure signal with restrained steady-grid-pulse motion.

Attempt 2 render report confirms WebGPU renderer/backend and WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial/LineBasicMaterial plus project material-factory evidence for color-field, matte-painted-surface, and procedural-marks.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionAdaptations: Kept as foreground artist mark behavior: near contour loops, scratches, drips, splatter, dot-grid catches, and compact color accents.
Offset slightly right and scaled below the primary pressure band so it intensifies the Saccaro surface without becoming another middleground barricade.

Kept as foreground artist mark behavior; offset slightly right, scaled below the primary band, and given lower motion intensity so loops, scratches, drips, and dot catches add Saccaro surface pressure without becoming a second barricade.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Static check succeeded for drafts/artist-mark-field.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Desktop Playwright preview succeeded with WebGPU renderer healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Preview screenshot shows a readable foreground Saccaro mark field: warm-earth rubbed patches, black contour tubes, off-white diagonal scrapes, radial rings, drips, splatter daubs, and seven compact color catches for the Tour favorites without adding a middleground barricade/grid structure.

Render report recorded WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, and runtime materialFactoryId evidence for procedural-marks, color-field, matte-painted-surface, and soft-particles.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionEvidence.draftIntent: Preserve the three accepted WebGPU-compatible Saccaro modules and assemble them into a central, frontal Tour de France 2026 pressure composition: environment as rubbed warm-earth field, flow-pressure as the primary middleground seven-favorite band, and artist-mark-field as the foreground calligraphic mark system.
